We are a Google Developer Group meetup that focuses in Android for beginners to experts with an emphasis on beginners! Our goal with this group is to build a vibrant Android community that is diverse and supportive of everyone included. We will start every meetup with some socializing followed by a quick beginner level topic so we can help each other get started and build our skills. Following that, we will have a break and then a speaker from the community will have an advanced Android talk to so we can take our skills to the next level! Join us as we show Omaha how incredible and supportive the Android community is. See you there!
Please contact the GDG organizers if you would like to start meeting on other Google topics.

Disclaimer: GDG Surrey is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here should in no way be linked to Google, the corporation. To learn more about the GDG program, visit https://developers.google.com/community/gdg
Our Vision
At Google Developer Groups (GDG) Surrey, we envision a diverse and inclusive tech community where everyone\u2014regardless of experience level\u2014feels empowered to learn, share, and grow.
Our mission is to:
Make technology accessible and engaging for all
Unite beginners, developers, creators, and changemakers
Encourage collaborative learning and community-led innovation
Foster a safe, inclusive, and welcoming environment
Whether you're just starting your tech journey or you're a seasoned professional, there's a place for you in our community.
Speaking Opportunities:
Interested in sharing your expertise or story at one of our upcoming events?
\ud83d\udc49 Apply here to be a speaker - gdgsurrey@gmail.com
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
Volunteers & Mentors
The heart of our GDG chapter is our volunteers. Whether you're helping organize events, manage community outreach, or contribute to our online presence, your efforts are what make this community vibrant. Join our Volunteer Team & Mentor Team here.
Community Spotlight
Have you or your group made a positive impact in the tech community? We want to celebrate that!
\ud83d\udc49 Submit to the Community Spotlight
This spotlight highlights inspiring stories at our monthly meetups.
Member Spotlight
Share your tech journey, challenges, and triumphs to inspire fellow community members.
\ud83d\udc49 Submit to the Member Spotlight
You'll be featured at our monthly Sunday meetup sessions.
Project Showcase
Have a cool project you\u2019d like to present to the community? Whether it's a side project, hackathon build, or community tool\u2014share it with us!
\ud83d\udc49 Apply for Project Showcase
Selected participants will get a slot at our upcoming monthly meetups.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
\ud83e\udd1d Community Partners
Are you part of a local tech group or organization and want to collaborate with GDG Surrey?
Contact us at: gdgSurrey@gmail.com
We welcome cross-community partnerships and co-hosted events!
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
\ud83d\udcbc Sponsors
Support our mission while showcasing your brand to a passionate tech community.
\ud83d\udcc4 View our Sponsorship Package
We offer sponsor opportunities for:
Media sponsorship
Food/beverage partnerships
Monetary support
Swag/giveaway contributions
Venue hosting
Have questions, feedback, or ideas?
Reach out anytime at gdgSurrey@gmail.com or join our Discord to stay connected!

Disclaimer: Google Developer Group (GDG) Cloud San Fernando Valley is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here should in no way be linked to Google, the corporation. To learn more about the GDG program, visit https://developers.google.com/community/gdg/
GDG stands for Google Developers Groups and is a platform offered by Google Developers to support community-run developer groups.
We are software developers, designers, educators and students with an interest in learning about emergent technologies in areas including mobile, web, wearables, cloud-native computing, education technology, data sciences and smart homes.
GDG Capital Region events will be a mixture of tech talks/demos that explore, for example, concepts and best practices, and hands-on hacking sessions that involve coding and collaboration. We also host flagship 'Extended' and 'DevFest' events. Please consider following us on Twitter.
To multiply the impact, we partner with leaders in the local and regional business and technical communities, as well as Google Developers.
Our talks may feature Google-developed technology but will also extend to other technologies, products and platforms as well. Focus is on collaborative communities and exciting technology that our developers can get their hands dirty with.
The overall primary goals of GDG Capital Region are to create networking, collaboration and entrepreneurial connections for technology enthusiasts in Albany, Troy, Saratoga, Schenectady and the entire Capital Region. If this fits, come check us out.
Joining GDG Capital Region is a two-step process:
First, create a GDG profile by clicking the Sign Up button: https://gdg.community.dev
Second, join GDG Cloud San Fernando Valley by clicking the Join button: https://gdg.community.dev/gdg-cloud-san-fernando-valley/", "id": 279, "hide_country_info": false, "logo": {}, "state": "CA", Disclaimer: GDG Surrey is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here should in no way be linked to Google, the corporation. To learn more about the GDG program, visit https://developers.google.com/community/gdg
Our Vision
At Google Developer Groups (GDG) Surrey, we envision a diverse and inclusive tech community where everyone\u2014regardless of experience level\u2014feels empowered to learn, share, and grow.
Our mission is to:
Make technology accessible and engaging for all
Unite beginners, developers, creators, and changemakers
Encourage collaborative learning and community-led innovation
Foster a safe, inclusive, and welcoming environment
Whether you're just starting your tech journey or you're a seasoned professional, there's a place for you in our community.
Speaking Opportunities:
Interested in sharing your expertise or story at one of our upcoming events?
\ud83d\udc49 Apply here to be a speaker - gdgsurrey@gmail.com
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
Volunteers & Mentors
The heart of our GDG chapter is our volunteers. Whether you're helping organize events, manage community outreach, or contribute to our online presence, your efforts are what make this community vibrant. Join our Volunteer Team & Mentor Team here.
Community Spotlight
Have you or your group made a positive impact in the tech community? We want to celebrate that!
\ud83d\udc49 Submit to the Community Spotlight
This spotlight highlights inspiring stories at our monthly meetups.
Member Spotlight
Share your tech journey, challenges, and triumphs to inspire fellow community members.
\ud83d\udc49 Submit to the Member Spotlight
You'll be featured at our monthly Sunday meetup sessions.
Project Showcase
Have a cool project you\u2019d like to present to the community? Whether it's a side project, hackathon build, or community tool\u2014share it with us!
\ud83d\udc49 Apply for Project Showcase
Selected participants will get a slot at our upcoming monthly meetups.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
\ud83e\udd1d Community Partners
Are you part of a local tech group or organization and want to collaborate with GDG Surrey?
Contact us at: gdgSurrey@gmail.com
We welcome cross-community partnerships and co-hosted events!
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
\ud83d\udcbc Sponsors
Support our mission while showcasing your brand to a passionate tech community.
\ud83d\udcc4 View our Sponsorship Package
We offer sponsor opportunities for:
Media sponsorship
Food/beverage partnerships
Monetary support
Swag/giveaway contributions
Venue hosting
Have questions, feedback, or ideas?
Reach out anytime at gdgSurrey@gmail.com or join our Discord to stay connected!
\ud83c\udf93 Resources

Welcome!
GDG on Campus at the University of Oklahoma is a brand new chapter (as of Fall 2024) and we're excited to start running events and help bring the OU community together! As a background, GDGoC stands for Google Developers Group on Campus, and we are a community-run developer group supported by Google Developers! We host events on The University of Oklahoma's campus such as learning hours on Google technology, mentor talks, and project discussions!
To be an official member of the club, you must be an OU student with an active student ID, though all majors, specialties, and career paths are welcome! To join, you will have to register with us through this Google Developer Groups site by pressing \"Join Us\" at the top of the page, as well as registering through OU Engage. We encourage anyone interested to register through these platforms to help support our club and allow us to put on bigger, better events! Thank You for your interest and we look forward to seeing you at our next event!
GDG on Campus: The University of Oklahoma - Norman, Oklahoma, USA is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here should in no way be linked to Google, the corporation. Welcome to GDG Fremont!- The Tech Pulse of America's Happiest City! \ud83d\ude80
We\u2019re a passionate community of developers, tech professionals, students, and innovators located in and around Fremont, California. Whether you\u2019re a seasoned expert or just getting started in tech, GDG Fremont offers a space where everyone can grow, collaborate, and thrive. We explore the latest technologies, share hands-on experiences, and welcome diverse perspectives. \ud83c\udf31
\ud83c\udfaf Our Mission
To empower the Fremont tech community by fostering collaboration, knowledge sharing, innovation, and leadership in an inclusive and supportive environment.
\ud83d\udc47 Here\u2019s why you\u2019ll love being part of GDG Fremont \ud83d\udc47
\ud83d\udd11 Why Join GDG Fremont?
Gain Valuable Skills \u2013 Learn about cutting-edge technologies through workshops, talks, and hands-on sessions. \ud83d\udca1
Connect with Innovators \u2013 Network with fellow developers, tech enthusiasts, and professionals in your area. \ud83e\udd1d
Shape the Future \u2013 Share your ideas, contribute to projects, and be part of something bigger. \ud83c\udf0d
\ud83d\udd17 Collaborate & Innovate
We believe in the power of collective creativity. Share your knowledge, work on real-world challenges, and help us build a community that makes a lasting impact. \ud83d\udcac
\ud83d\udcda Grow Your Skills
Whether you're here to learn, lead, or collaborate\u2014GDG Fremont offers events, mentorship, and access to projects to help you level up. \ud83d\udcbc
\ud83c\udf0d Make a Local and Global Impact
Your journey in tech matters! We offer a platform for you to make a difference\u2014locally in Fremont and in the broader global developer ecosystem. \ud83d\ude80
Our Goals
1. Foster a Strong, Inclusive Community \ud83c\udf1f
Create welcoming, respectful spaces for all attendees, regardless of experience level.
Extend our reach throughout Fremont and neighboring cities by collaborating with local schools, colleges, tech hubs, and businesses.
2. Advance Skills & Career Growth \ud83c\udf93
Offer mentorship, career talks, and networking sessions.
Enable project-based collaboration to help members gain practical experience.
Host industry-led workshops focused on the latest tools, frameworks, and trends.
3. Drive Innovation & Leadership \ud83d\udca1
Organize hackathons and developer challenges to spark creativity.
Host tech meetups, summits, and speaker events to spread new ideas.
Highlight member achievements by showcasing their projects and thought leadership.
4. Make a Meaningful Social Impact \ud83c\udf0d
Launch and support open source and tech-for-good initiatives.
Promote inclusive practices in tech, ensuring equal opportunities for everyone.
Collaborate with nonprofits and social causes to use technology for positive change.
Get Involved
\ud83d\udcbc Sponsor an Event - Find out how..
Are you a business or organization interested in supporting local tech? Sponsor a GDG Fremont event and showcase your brand to a diverse and growing tech audience. Reach out to us at gdgfremont@gmail.com \ud83d\udc8c
\ud83d\udee0\ufe0f Speak/ Host a Workshop - Submit your CFP here
Have a skill you\u2019d love to share? We\u2019ll help you organize and host a workshop to teach others and build your personal brand. \ud83e\udde0
\ud83c\udfaf Learn Something New
Looking to expand your tech stack or explore new areas? We\u2019ll connect you with the right learning resources and support. \ud83d\ude80
\ud83d\udd17 Build Your Network
Meet future collaborators, mentors, hiring managers, and friends. Join us to grow your professional connections. \ud83d\udd0d
\u2764\ufe0f Support a Cause
If you\u2019re a nonprofit, let\u2019s partner up for a tech-for-good initiative! We\u2019re passionate about using tech to support meaningful missions. \ud83e\udd1d
\ud83c\udf1fBecome a Volunteer! - Sign up to volunteer with us
We welcome volunteers of all backgrounds! Whether you\u2019re a student, professional, or enthusiast, we\u2019d love your help organizing events and building this community. \ud83d\ude4c
Partner with GDG Fremont \ud83e\udd1d
We\u2019re always looking for like-minded partners\u2014whether you\u2019re a university, company, startup, or local organization. Let\u2019s work together to drive innovation and build an inclusive tech ecosystem. \ud83d\udcbc
Ways to Partner:
Sponsor an Event: Gain exposure while supporting community learning and innovation. \ud83c\udfa4
Collaborate on Projects: Help us create opportunities and solve real-world problems together. \ud83c\udf1f
Support Talent Development: Connect with local developers and professionals ready to grow. \ud83d\ude80
\ud83d\udce7 Interested in partnering? Reach out to gdg.fremont@gmail.com
\ud83d\udce3 Sponsorship Opportunities
Support the growth of the Fremont developer community and boost your brand visibility by sponsoring GDG Fremont events.
Benefits of Sponsoring GDG Fremont:
\ud83d\udce2 Visibility: Position your brand in front of Fremont's rising tech talent.
\ud83d\udd17 Networking: Build strong connections with engineers, students, and innovators.
\ud83c\udf31 Community Impact: Help us create meaningful opportunities for learning, mentorship, and tech-for-good projects.
To learn more about our sponsorship packages, email us at gdgfremont@gmail.com or click Sponsorships on our site.
Let\u2019s Build the Future of Tech\u2014Together. \ud83d\ude80
